title: Sturdy Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Flash loan followed by price manipulation on lending protocol

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls manipulatePrice() after a flash loan borrow in the same tx

red_flags: Front-running protection built into the attack contract
monitoring_rules: BLOCK MANIPULATE_PRICE if FLASHLOAN_BORROW in the same transaction
summary: Sturdy Finance lost $800k due to a price manipulation exploit using a flash loan. A flash loan was taken out, the price of collateral was manipulated, and then the profit was withdrawn. A guard could have blocked such transactions by preventing price manipulation calls after a flash loan.
